user.name: Robert Breen
user.bio: Professional services consultant with over 10 years of experience solving complex business problems across industries. I specialize in n8n and process automation—designing custom workflows that integrate tools like Google Calendar, Airtable, GPT, and internal systems. Whether you need to automate scheduling, sync data, or streamline operations, I build solutions that save time and drive results.
